description: Dark Academia Premium redesign with unified design system, Jeffrey voice rewrite, TTS integration, and mascot

userStories.title: Header Component Redesign
userStories.description: As a user, I want a consistent global navigation header so that I can navigate between pages seamlessly.
acceptanceCriteria: Header uses design tokens from src/lib/design-tokens.ts (dark bgCard, bronze primary)
Header displays Jeffrey logo/chin mascot, navigation links (Input, Members, Graph, Suggestions)
Header has hover states using bgHover token
Header is consistent across all pages (Landing, Auth, Input, Members, Graph, Suggestions)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed: Header uses dark bgCard background, bronze primary accents, JeffreyLogo SVG mascot, hover states use bgHover token.

userStories.title: Input Page Redesign
userStories.description: As a user, I want a redesigned Input page with Dark Academia styling so that recording interactions feels premium.
acceptanceCriteria: Input page uses Dark Academia color palette (bg #141210, primary #c9956a, text #f5f0e8)
Textarea and button use shared UI components (Input, Button from src/components/ui/)
Jeffrey greeting copy uses natural Chinese tone (not stiff/translated)
Design tokens覆盖率 ≥90% (most styles use design-tokens.ts)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed: Input page uses Dark Academia color palette (bg #141210, primary #c9956a, text #f5f0e8). Textarea uses shared UI component, Button uses shared UI component. Jeffrey greeting copy uses natural Chinese tone from jeffrey-quotes.ts. Design tokens coverage >= 90%.

userStories.title: MiniMax TTS Service Creation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a TTS service so that Jeffrey can speak his lines aloud.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/services/tts.ts with MiniMax TTS client
Support streaming audio via fetch + ReadableStream
Handle API key authentication via environment variable
Export playText(text) function that returns audio stream
Typecheck passes
Tests pass (if test file exists)
userStories.notes: API: POST https://api.minimaxi.com/v1/t2a_v2, Model: speech-2.8-hd, Voice: male-qn-qingse, Auth: Bearer token (MINIMAX_API_KEY env var)

userStories.title: TTS UI Integration
userStories.description: As a user, I want to hear Jeffrey speak so that the interaction feels more alive.
acceptanceCriteria: Add play button next to Jeffrey's text on Input page
Add play button next to Jeffrey's text on Suggestions page
Clicking play triggers TTS streaming audio playback
New input interrupts current playback
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Jeffrey Mascot SVG Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see Jeffrey's mascot so that the brand is more memorable.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/components/JeffreyMascot.tsx SVG component
Style: antique bronze (#c9956a) chin silhouette, Vault-style
Sizes: 40px (header), 80px (input), 200px (landing)
States: idle, speaking, thinking, smiling, warning
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Mascot TTS Sync Animation
userStories.description: As a user, I want the mascot to animate in sync with TTS so that the interaction feels cohesive.
acceptanceCriteria: When TTS starts: mascot enters 'speaking' state with mouth animation
When TTS ends: mascot returns to 'idle' state
Animation uses CSS (no JS animation library)
Idle state has subtle breathing animation (scale 0.98-1.02)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Depends on US-007 TTS UI integration
